allow:
Bash(git add Sources/DockPeek/Core/DockMonitor.swift Sources/DockPeek/UI/PreviewPanelController.swift && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: correct AX URL type handling and mouse coordinate system

DockMonitor:
- kAXURLAttribute returns CFURL, not String — use CFGetTypeID check before cast
- Remove erroneous CG→NS coordinate conversion in handleMouseMoved;
  AXUIElement positions are in CG coordinate space \(top-left origin\), matching
  CGEvent.location directly — no flip needed
- Guard empty bundleID to avoid matching unidentified dock items

PreviewPanelController:
- Apply same CFURL type-check fix in findDockIconCenter URL matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/juholee/DockPeek add Sources/DockPeek/App/AppDelegate.swift Sources/DockPeek/Core/WindowActivator.swift Sources/DockPeek/Core/ThumbnailGenerator.swift && git -C /Users/juholee/DockPeek commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: apply remaining Phase 1 QA recommendations

- ISSUE-06: move status bar icon update before runModal\(\) in showPermissionAlert
  so the warning icon is visible while the modal is displayed
- ISSUE-02: strengthen title-fallback comments in matchesWindow\(_:target:\)
  documenting the invariant that target.title is never empty and that
  returning true when axTitle is empty is intentional
- INFO: correct ThumbnailGenerator header comment macOS 13+ -> macOS 14+

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add Sources/DockPeek/App/AppDelegate.swift Sources/DockPeek/App/AppSettings.swift Sources/DockPeek/Core/DockMonitor.swift Sources/DockPeek/Core/ThumbnailGenerator.swift Sources/DockPeek/UI/SettingsView.swift Sources/DockPeek/UI/WindowThumbnailView.swift && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: resolve Phase 2 QA issues \(P2-04, P2-02, P2-05, P2-06\)

P2-04 [HIGH] WindowThumbnailView: thumbSize와 LazyVGrid GridItem 너비를
AppSettings.shared.thumbnailWidth/Height에서 읽도록 수정.
설정 변경이 즉시 렌더링에 반영되며, .task\(id: thumbSize\)로 크기 변경 시
썸네일도 자동 재캡처된다.

P2-02 [MEDIUM] ThumbnailGenerator: captureWithSCKit에서 SCShareableContent
목록에 해당 windowID가 없을 때 캐시를 즉시 무효화\(nil\)한 뒤 CGWindow fallback.
다음 호출 시 최신 목록으로 재조회하여 SCKit 품질을 복구한다.

P2-05 [MEDIUM] AppSettings: launchAtLogin 등록 실패 시 launchAtLogin = false
롤백 + lastLaunchAtLoginError: String? 프로퍼티 노출.
SettingsView: 에러가 있으면 토글 아래에 빨간 경고 텍스트 표시.

P2-06 [LOW] AppDelegate: openSettings에서 settingsWindow != nil 체크 시
isMiniaturized 상태도 고려 — 최소화된 경우 deminiaturize 후 makeKeyAndOrderFront.

INFO AppSettings.Keys: private → internal 승격해 DockMonitor와 공유.
INFO DockMonitor: "hoverDelay" 문자열 리터럴 → AppSettings.Keys.hoverDelay,
기본값 0.4 하드코딩 → AppSettings.Defaults.hoverDelay로 교체.
INFO SettingsView: @StateObject → @ObservedObject \(싱글톤은 뷰가 소유 안 함\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add Sources/DockPeek/Core/DockMonitor.swift Sources/DockPeek/UI/PreviewPanelController.swift Sources/DockPeek/App/AppDelegate.swift && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: keep preview panel visible when mouse moves onto it

DockMonitor: add isMouseOverPanel callback — skip scheduleHoverEnd\(\)
when the pointer is over the preview panel
PreviewPanelController: add containsMouse\(at:\) converting CG→NS coords
AppDelegate: wire isMouseOverPanel to previewController.containsMouse

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
